monday.description: Stir-frying the organic chicken breast and pea shoots in sesame oil brings out their flavors, which harmonize with the Pad Thai Rice Noodles.

tuesday.description: Stir-fried chicken hearts with rehydrated cloud ear mushrooms and quick-cook wild rice, flavored with Panang curry paste.

wednesday.description: Slow-cooked smoked pastrami served with rolled oats and sautéed kale, topped with oat yogurt.

thursday.description: King crab legs roasted with fonio and reishi mushrooms, finished with organic sheep butter.

friday.description: Pan-seared hake stir-fried with Romanesco and chow mein noodles, seasoned with coconut aminos.

monday.description: Grilled feta cheese served with steamed fiddlehead ferns and bao buns, garnished with winter savory.

tuesday.description: Grated double Gloucester cheese served with parboiled rice and sautéed nopales, flavored with coriander.

wednesday.description: Grated Nabulsi cheese served with long-grain rice and roasted habanero peppers, topped with Thousand Island dressing.

thursday.description: Candlenuts roasted with whole grain mochi rice and rehydrated chanterelle mushrooms, flavored with ground star anise.

friday.description: Sliced Gouda cheese wrapped in a baguette with lettuce and flavored with dried pasilla chiles.
